appliedUpdates.description: Added note about category enum mismatch: shared/categories.ts exports 8 categories (including Fragrances, Eyewear) while API route files only accept 6. Dashboard edit page uses full set but API may reject the extras.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Backend-worker skill could note that curl testing against a running API is optional when unit tests via inject() fully cover the behavior. For pure validation/schema fixes, inject()-based tests are sufficient and more reliable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for api-category-validation-fixes noted in handoff that curl testing was unnecessary since all changes were validated via Vitest inject() tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: DATABASE_URL_TEST defaults to postgresql://postgres@localhost:5432/galileo_test which fails on macOS where the default user is the OS user.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — .factory/library/environment.md PostgreSQL section documents this: 'Local connections use the OS user (detected dynamically via whoami or $PGUSER)' and 'Test connection: controlled by DATABASE_URL_TEST env var (fallback: postgresql://postgres@localhost:5432/galileo_test)'. The init.sh also auto-detects the OS user.
